anglophone.title: About 7 million kids live in a home with a loaded and unlocked gun, a study finds
anglophone.excerpt: The new study in JAMA Network Open also finds that more parents leave their guns loaded and unlocked when they have teenagers, despite the fact that suicide risk goes up for this age group.

anglophone.title: The SPLC survived firebombs and death threats. Will it survive Trump 2.0?
anglophone.excerpt: The Southern Poverty Law Center is facing a serious threat from the Justice Department — and comes at a time when several former and current SPLC employees say the group is already deeply vulnerable.
